subsection: Introduction or enhancement to digital services
title: Digital Services Notification Requirement
verbatim: A financial institution must notify the Bank in accordance with the requirements in paragraphs 16.2 to 16.7 prior to introducing new digital services or enhancement to existing digital services.
translation: Notify BNM within 4 hours of detecting any material technology or cybersecurity incident. Include what happened, what systems are affected, estimated impact, and what you are doing about it. Submit a detailed follow-up report within 14 days.

artifacts.name: BNM Incident Notification Procedure
artifacts.description: Procedure for notifying BNM of material incidents within four hours

artifacts.name: Notification Templates
artifacts.description: Templates for initial notification and 14-day follow-up report to BNM

artifacts.name: Notification Records
artifacts.description: Records of all BNM incident notifications and follow-up reports

subsection: Introduction or enhancement to digital services
title: First-Time Digital Services Notification
verbatim: A financial institution offering digital services for the first time must undertake measures specified under paragraph 16.4 and submit the following information in the notification to the Bank: (a) assessment on the risks identified and strategies to manage such risks. This includes specific accountabilities, policies and controls to address risks; (b) security arrangements and controls; (c) significant terms and conditions; (d) client charter; (e) privacy policy statement; and (f) any outsourcing or website link arrangements, or strategic alliances or partnerships with third parties that have been finalised.
translation: Notify BNM about major technology projects at least three months before implementation. Include the project scope, risk assessment, and implementation timeline. This applies to projects that could significantly affect operations or customers.

artifacts.name: Technology Project Notification Procedure
artifacts.description: Procedure for notifying BNM of major technology projects

artifacts.name: Project Notification Records
artifacts.description: Records of technology project notifications submitted to BNM

artifacts.name: Major Project Risk Assessments
artifacts.description: Risk assessments for major projects submitted as part of BNM notification

subsection: Introduction or enhancement to digital services
title: Simplified Enhancement Notification
verbatim: For any enhancements to existing digital services which meet the criteria in Appendix 6, a financial institution shall be subject to a simplified notification requirement and submit the following information in the notification to the Bank: (a) description of the enhancements to the existing technologies; and (b) risk assessment of the proposed enhancements, including the impact and measures to mitigate identified risks.
translation: Before entering into any material technology outsourcing arrangement, notify BNM. Include the scope of services being outsourced, the risk assessment, and how you will oversee the arrangement.

artifacts.name: Outsourcing Notification Procedure
artifacts.description: Procedure for notifying BNM of material technology outsourcing arrangements

artifacts.name: Outsourcing Notification Records
artifacts.description: Records of outsourcing notifications submitted to BNM

artifacts.name: Outsourcing Risk Assessment
artifacts.description: Risk assessment for material outsourcing arrangements submitted to BNM

subsection: Introduction or enhancement to digital services
title: Full Enhancement Notification Requirements
verbatim: For any enhancements to existing digital services which are not subject to the simplified notification requirement under paragraph 16.3, a financial institution is required to undertake the following measures prior to notifying the Bank: (a) engage an independent external party to provide assurance that the financial institution has addressed the technology risks and security controls associated with the digital services or any material enhancement to the digital services. The format of the assurance shall be as set out in Part A of Appendix 7; and (b) provide a confirmation by the CISO, senior management officer or the chairman of the board or designated board-level committee specified in paragraph 8.3 of the financial institution’s readiness to provide digital services or implement any material enhancement to the digital services. The format of the confirmation shall be as set out in Part B of Appendix 7.
translation: Before using cloud services for critical systems or customer data, notify BNM. Include your cloud risk assessment, data residency arrangements, and the shared responsibility model with your cloud provider.
evidence: Cloud risk assessments submitted to BNM
Data residency and shared responsibility documentation

artifacts.name: Cloud Adoption Notification Procedure
artifacts.description: Procedure for notifying BNM prior to cloud service adoption

artifacts.name: Cloud Notification Records
artifacts.description: Records of cloud adoption notifications submitted to BNM

artifacts.name: Cloud Risk Assessment for BNM
artifacts.description: Cloud risk assessments submitted as part of BNM notification

subsection: Introduction or enhancement to digital services
title: External Assurance Competency
verbatim: A financial institution must ensure that the independent external party providing the assurance is competent and has a good track record. The assurance shall address the matters covered in, and comply with, Part C and D of Appendix 7.
translation: Report significant IT audit findings to BNM within 30 days of the audit report being finalised. This applies to findings that indicate material weaknesses in technology risk management, cybersecurity, or regulatory compliance.
evidence: Audit finding reporting procedure for BNM

artifacts.name: Audit Finding Reporting Procedure
artifacts.description: Procedure for reporting significant technology audit findings to BNM

artifacts.name: Audit Finding Notifications
artifacts.description: Records of significant audit findings reported to BNM within 30 days

artifacts.name: Significant Finding Criteria
artifacts.description: Criteria for determining which audit findings require BNM notification

subsection: Introduction or enhancement to digital services
title: Document Provision to Bank
verbatim: A financial institution shall provide relevant documents for the Bank’s review when required by the Bank.
translation: Respond to BNM examination findings within the required timeframes. Develop action plans for every finding and report progress to both the board and BNM. Full cooperation with regulatory examinations is mandatory.
evidence: Progress reports to BNM and board

artifacts.name: Regulatory Examination Response Procedure
artifacts.description: Procedure for responding to BNM examination findings within required timeframes

artifacts.name: Examination Finding Action Plans
artifacts.description: Action plans for all regulatory examination findings with timelines

artifacts.name: Progress Reports to BNM
artifacts.description: Progress reports on examination finding remediation submitted to BNM

subsection: Introduction or enhancement to digital services
title: Immediate Service Offering Upon Notification
verbatim: A financial institution may offer digital services or implement any enhancement to the digital services immediately upon submission of the notification under paragraph 16.1 and compliance with the requirements in paragraphs 16.2 to 16.6.
translation: Submit an annual technology risk report to BNM covering your current risk posture, significant incidents from the past year, key risk metrics, and your plans for improving technology risk management in the coming year.
evidence: Annual technology risk report submitted to BNM
Planned initiatives for the coming year

artifacts.name: Annual Technology Risk Report
artifacts.description: Comprehensive annual technology risk report submitted to BNM

artifacts.name: Technology Risk Posture Assessment
artifacts.description: Assessment of current technology risk posture included in annual report

artifacts.name: Planned Risk Initiatives
artifacts.description: Documented plans for technology risk management initiatives in the coming year
